title: Merry Chests
description: Changes normal chests into the festive kind!
body:
## Merry Chests
Celebrate the Holidays year-round! This resource pack transforms the regular and trapped chests into their festive counterparts. This texture pack is perfect for when you are feeling festive or want to feel like you were given a present.

### Current Features
- Festive Trapped/Normal Single/Double Chest Variants
- Festive Minecart Chest Variant

### Upcoming Features
- Festive Boat Chest Variant
- Festive Chest Item Variants
- Festive Minecart Chest Item Variant
